payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory deletion or update was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL deletion command attempt from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact.

details: No memory_cards were created, modified, or deleted.
The command was treated as an unauthorized admin operation attempt.

repair_options: If you intended to delete a specific memory, use the supported user-facing memory deletion workflow.
If you are an administrator, authenticate through the proper admin interface rather than issuing SQL in chat.
